## Summary

Describe the change and the business or user value it provides.

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Content or design update
- [ ] Performance or accessibility improvement
- [ ] Maintenance

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Desktop layout checked
- [ ] Mobile layout checked
- [ ] Links and forms checked
- [ ] No secrets, private data or unlicensed assets added

## Screenshots or recording

Add before/after evidence for visual changes.

## Deployment notes

Mention environment variables, migrations, hosting changes or follow-up actions.
